title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for validated library entity types after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

from typing import Any

content.text: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: python construction invariants. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Oop New Init, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of validated library entity types while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: The return value of __init__ becomes the newly created instance. This fails the Oop New Init contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
